summary: Comprehensive testing of Graupner Suite Iteration 10 features: Customer Status, Stats Overview, Quote Followup, and Settings Expansion. Fixed critical route ordering bug in backend. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working.

fixed.issue: Route was defined AFTER /api/quotes/{quote_id}, causing 'followup' to be matched as quote_id and returning 404
fixed.fix: Moved followup routes before {quote_id} route in server.py

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stats/overview?view=anfragen returns grouped data by categories
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview?view=kunden returns grouped data by customer statuses (Neu, In Arbeit, Angebot geschrieben, Auftrag erteilt, Abgeschlossen)
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview?view=leistungen returns grouped data by Leistungen/Artikel
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/quotes/followup returns quotes waiting 7+ days with days_waiting field
Backend: POST /api/quotes/check-followup triggers push for pending quotes and returns followup_count
Backend: Followup endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/email/followup/{quote_id} returns 404 for nonexistent quote
Backend: POST /api/email/followup requires authentication
Backend: Customer model includes 'status' field with default 'Neu'
Backend: Customer can be created with specific status
Backend: Customer status can be updated and persists
Backend: CompanySettings includes km_rate, hourly_travel_rate, company_address fields
Backend: CompanySettings includes default_due_days, default_quote_validity_days, email_signature fields
Backend: Fahrtkosten settings can be updated
Backend: Zahlungsziele settings can be updated
Frontend: Dashboard has 'Übersicht' widget with Anfragen/Kunden/Leistungen tabs
Frontend: Overview tabs switch correctly and display grouped data
Frontend: Kunden overview shows all 5 customer statuses with counts
Frontend: Dashboard shows followup banner '3 Angebote seit 7+ Tagen ohne Rückmeldung'
Frontend: Dashboard has 'Wiedervorlage' button for followup quotes
Frontend: /customers page has status filter pills (Alle Status, Neu, In Arbeit, Angebot geschrieben, Auftrag erteilt, Abgeschlossen)
Frontend: Status filter pills are clickable and filter customers
Frontend: Customer modal has Status dropdown with default 'Neu'
Frontend: Customer modal shows OpenStreetMap link 'Auf Karte anzeigen' when address is entered
Frontend: OpenStreetMap link correctly encodes address in URL
Frontend: Settings page has 'Fahrtkosten' section with Firmenstandort, km-Satz, Stundensatz Fahrt fields
Frontend: Settings page has 'Zahlungsziele & Standards' section with Zahlungsziel, Angebots-Gültigkeit, E-Mail-Signatur fields
Frontend: Settings values display correctly (km_rate: 0.3, hourly_travel_rate: 45, default_due_days: 14, default_quote_validity_days: 30)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug - /quotes/followup must be defined BEFORE /quotes/{quote_id} in FastAPI to avoid path parameter matching
Customer status field properly defaults to 'Neu' and supports all 5 statuses
CompanySettings model correctly includes all new Fahrtkosten and Zahlungsziele fields
Stats overview endpoint properly groups data by categories, customer statuses, or services/articles based on view parameter
Followup feature correctly identifies quotes with status 'Gesendet' or 'Entwurf' older than 7 days
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 12 customers (all with status 'Neu'), 3 quotes waiting 7+ days, 3 Leistungen, 3 Artikel
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/stats/overview?view=anfragen|kunden|leistungen (grouped overview data), GET /api/quotes/followup (quotes waiting 7+ days), POST /api/quotes/check-followup (triggers push notifications). Customer model now has 'status' field with values: Neu, In Arbeit, Angebot geschrieben, Auftrag erteilt, Abgeschlossen. CompanySettings has new fields: km_rate, hourly_travel_rate, company_address, default_due_days, default_quote_validity_days, email_signature. Frontend: Dashboard has overview widget with tabs, followup banner, Customers page has status filter pills, Customer modal has status dropdown and OpenStreetMap link, Settings page has Fahrtkosten and Zahlungsziele sections.

bug_fix_details.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /quotes/{quote_id} was defined before /quotes/followup, so 'followup' was being matched as a quote_id parameter
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Moved FOLLOWUP_DAYS constant and followup routes (GET /quotes/followup, POST /quotes/check-followup) to be defined immediately after GET /quotes and before GET /quotes/{quote_id}
bug_fix_details.verification: All 16 backend tests now pass including followup endpoint tests
